# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: myWebApp
    properties:
      location: eastus
      appServicePlan: myAppPlan
      runtimeStack: "dotnet:6.0"
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: ConnectionStrings__mySqlDatabase
            value: Server=mySqlDatabase;Database=myDatabase;User Id=myUser;Password=myPassword;
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: mySqlDatabase
    properties:
      location: eastus
      administratorLogin: myUser
      administratorPassword: myPassword
      version: "12.0"
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: myStorageAccount
    properties:
      location: eastus
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accountTier: Standard_LRS
      accessTier: Hot
outputs:
  - name: appConnectionString
    value: $(myWebApp.connectionStrings.mySqlDatabase)
